item.title: Making the Best of the Worst
item.description: Covid and a year abroad I distinctly remember a professor writing on the whiteboard the number of sars cases in the US and the number in Cleveland.

item.title: Is emacs worth the strife?
item.description: Why use Emacs (Doom/ Spacemacs / Vanilla) Since I started studying Computer Science I have had to work with several different languages / frameworks and as a result have had to install a myriad of applications to handle each new challenge and or language.

item.title: Wrapping Up Training at Namsan
item.description: I was far from alone in terms of people who’s lives had been radically changed by covid.

item.title: New Website
item.description: I made this website using Hugo with the Soho theme

item.title: About
item.description: Cade Lueker aspiring software engineer and current student Education Case Western Reserve University Currently a CWRU student studying computer science Going for a B.

item.title: Grappling
item.description: Wrestling I began wrestling at 14 and decided it would be my only sport the last two years of high school (I was previously running track and playing football).
